theme: Luxury Design with Dual Modes (Dark for Men, Light for Women)

core_principles: Exclusive & Premium: Every pixel should feel expensive and highly curated.
Dual Identity: Complete separation between Men (Dark Moody, Gold) and Women (Light Soft, Rose Gold) interfaces.
Cinematic Lighting: Use gradients and shadows to simulate real-world studio lighting.
RTL First: Designed ground-up for Arabic typography and Right-To-Left layouts.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-snug font-semibold

spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use 2x standard padding (e.g., p-8 or p-12 for containers) to create a luxurious, uncrowded feel.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grids: Use Mode A 'Tetris Grid' for the Top Barbers and salon showcases. Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Always use 1px solid borders tinted towards the primary color (e.g., border-white/10 for men, border-black/5 for women).
spacing_and_layout.radius: Subtle rounded corners (rounded-lg or rounded-xl max). Avoid fully rounded pills except for small badges.

components.buttons: Flat background with 1px inner glow. Primary buttons use the theme's primary color with contrasting text. Hover states add a subtle shadow and brightness.
components.cards: Cardless or flat cards with 1px border. No heavy drop shadows. For men: bg-[#141414] border-[#262626]. For women: bg-white border-[#E7E5E4].
components.inputs: Shadcn inputs customized. bg-transparent border-b-2 (underlined style) or fully enclosed with subtle border and focus ring of primary color.
components.navigation: Sticky header with Crystal Glassmorphism. Men: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10. Women: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-black/5.
components.gender_selection: 50/50 split screen on desktop. Left side Dark/Gold (Men), Right side Light/Rose Gold (Women). Hover expands the side slightly with smooth transition.
components.calendars: Shadcn calendar, customized with luxury fonts. High contrast for selected dates (Gold/Rose Gold background, dark/white text).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) with a soft diffuse shadow.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-300 ease-out'. Avoid snappy linear animations.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Fade in content sequentially. Stagger lists (like Top Barbers) with 100ms delay.

hero_men.description: Luxurious dark barber shop chairs and sinks, perfectly matching the dark/gold mood.
hero_men.usage: Men's section hero background or gender selection side.

hero_women.description: Bright, elegant women's salon with soft lighting.
hero_women.usage: Women's section hero background or gender selection side.

salon_interior_men.description: Barbers cutting hair in a modern luxury salon.
salon_interior_men.usage: Profile page banners for men's salons.

salon_interior_women.description: Stylish black backwash chair in bright modern salon.
salon_interior_women.usage: Profile page banners for women's salons.

tools_abstract.usage: About section, filler bento box images, or default service thumbnails.

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST implement RTL support (dir='rtl') and use logical properties (start/end) instead of left/right for margins/padding.
Do NOT use generic fonts like Inter. Import and use 'Tajawal' and 'Playfair Display' from Google Fonts.
Ensure the Gender Selection is the first thing users see. It should be a dramatic 50/50 split (Men/Women) routing to their respective themes.
Strictly follow the color palettes. Men's UI is Dark Mode locked. Women's UI is Light Mode locked.
Use Shadcn UI for forms, calendars, and dashboards, but heavily customize borders and padding to feel 'expensive' and cardless where appropriate.
Never use generic placeholder images. Use the provided high-quality image_urls.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, inputs, and interactive elements.
